_doc: LLM routing for each pipeline stage.
Copy this file to llm_config.json and edit as needed.
default     - fallback when a stage is not listed below
planner     - Node 3: turns user topic into a list of animation steps
(also used by concept_retrieval and code_retrieval keyword/summarize LLM calls)
step        - Node 4: writes detailed narration + visual plan per step
pseudocode  - Node 7: generates per-scene structured outline (objects, animations, beats)
code        - Node 8: generates Manim scene code from the step description
fix         - Node 9: patches/rewrites broken Manim code after a validation error
Env vars take priority over this file:
